examples.title: Algorithm: Efficient String Joining with Delimiter
examples.description: Optimal approach for joining multiple strings with separator
examples.code:
ALGORITHM JoinStrings
BEGIN
 INITIALIZE buffer with StringBuilder
 INITIALIZE firstElement flag as true
 
 FOR EACH element IN elements
 IF firstElement
 APPEND element to buffer
 SET firstElement to false
 ELSE
 APPEND delimiter + element to buffer
 END IF
 END FOR
 
 RETURN buffer.toString()
END
examples.explanation:
1. Uses StringBuilder for O(n) time complexity
2. Avoids leading/trailing delimiters
3. Handles empty input gracefully

examples.title: StringJoiner with Prefix/Suffix
examples.description: Modern Java approach for formatted string joining
examples.explanation:
1. StringJoiner constructor takes delimiter, prefix, suffix
2. add() method handles element insertion
3. Automatic handling of formatting characters

examples.title: String.join() Utility Method
examples.explanation:
1. Directly joins Collection elements
2. No manual loop required
3. Uses StringJoiner internally

examples.title: StringBuilder with Delimiter Control
examples.description: Manual approach for complex joining logic
examples.explanation:
1. Initial empty delimiter
2. Updates delimiter after first element
3. Avoids trailing comma
4. More efficient than += operator
